title: Fast Local Feedback, Hooks, and Developer Experience · Risk Brief: Feedback Quality
summary: Create fast local gates that match CI without blocking ordinary iteration. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates feedback quality increment in a one-command local verification workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Make failures concise, reproducible locally, and linked to remediation.
Document exact gate commands and completion expectations in AGENTS.md or equivalent.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
